title: User
description: A Looker user account. Users have credentials, roles, and can own content such as Looks, dashboards, and queries.

avatar_url.description: URL of the user's avatar image

is_disabled.description: Whether the user account is disabled

home_space_id.description: ID of the user's personal space (folder)

home_folder_id.description: ID of the user's personal folder

personal_space_id.description: ID of the user's personal space

personal_folder_id.description: ID of the user's personal folder

presumed_looker_employee.description: Whether the user is a Looker employee

verified_looker_employee.description: Whether the user is a verified Looker employee

roles_externally_managed.description: Whether user roles are managed externally (e.g. via SAML)

allow_direct_roles.description: Whether roles can be assigned directly to this user

allow_normal_group_membership.description: Whether the user can be added to groups

allow_roles_from_normal_groups.description: Whether the user inherits roles from groups

role_ids.description: IDs of roles assigned to this user

group_ids.description: IDs of groups this user belongs to

created_at.description: Timestamp when the user was created
